hooks.notes: Rowan now clearly understands that legal rank is required to convert discovery into leverage; new concrete objective is to qualify and secure fee/bond before Pike locks him out.
Ledger confirms survival threshold held: provisional record retained, claim relevance noted, but legal standing insufficient; system recognition advances without full reward.
Old corridor gains stronger claim value: rails, utility sigils, worked-metal tang, mold chamber, and a surface-linked service exit all suggest significant hidden infrastructure.
Joren Pike appears directly, tries to extract route details through guild procedure, and is positioned as Rowan’s immediate legal-economic antagonist tied to family debt pressure.
Lin Vey has not appeared yet; no change.
Corridor is now explicitly framed as potentially claim-worthy infrastructure/salvage worth concealing until legal filing; surface exit raises stakes of ownership.
Lio reveals provisional hall qualification screens as Rowan’s first legal route to papers; barriers include fee, sponsor or bond note, and survival after probation.
Rowan chooses withdrawal over deeper search; Benn and Derren remain missing below, and their unresolved status now carries moral and witness consequences.
